Apartment for sale - Harry Fultz

€ 265,000
Description
  • First published: 13/01/2026
  • Last updated: 03/03/2026
  • Property code: 13231793

For sale 3+1 apartment full of light near the "Panorama" Complex

The apartment is located in a central area with immediate access to the Small Ring Road. The building has an elevator and also 2 floors of underground parking.

Organization: entrance and distribution corridor, spacious naturally lit living room, separate annexed kitchen area, one matrimonial bedroom, one children's bedroom, one studio room, 2 toilets, 1 balcony.
